topic: James Webb Space Telescope: telescope architecture, star formation, and the early universe

artifacts.description: Knowledge graph with 5 nodes and 4 edges extracted from JWST sources
2 normalized documents from NASA mission overview and fact sheet
Original source manifest with 6 NASA/ESA source references

regeneration_command:
# Upstream artifacts are owned by material-ingestion-pipeline.
# To regenerate, re-run the ingestion pipeline and copy outputs here.
known_limitations: Raw web assets are not bundled; sources point to live URLs.
Embedding vectors are not included (embedding_vector_ref is null).
ChunkSet contains only 6 representative chunks, not a full document split.
NormalizedDocumentSet contains 2 documents; full ingestion would include all 6 sources.
